_comment: Verified Wikidata identifiers per election cycle. QIDs confirmed 2026-07-04 via live SPARQL/wbsearchentities; see docs/journals/2026-07-04.01.wikidata-identifiers-verified.md. Term dates marked verified:false are carried from the plan and still need confirmation against the source bulletins.

na16-2026.notes: Provinces merged 63 -> 34 effective 2025-07-01; NA seats reapportioned Dec 2025. Electoral units differ entirely from na15-2021.
